name: Bourbon and Honey Smoke-Roasted Pork Tenderloin
recipeInstructions:
Marinate 3 pork tenderloins in the following marinade for at least 24 hours:
- 1 cup Olive oil
- 1/2 cup Bourbon
- 3 tbsp Honey
- 1/2 cup Lemon juice
- 1 tbsp Minced garlic
- 1/2 cup Thinly sliced onion
- 2 tbsp Fresh sage
- 1 tsp Pepper
- 1 tsp Salt
To cook:
1. Preheat charcoal in an outdoor grill and soak wood chips (up to 8, preferably fruitwood) in water for 30 minutes.
2. Add the soaked wood chips to the hot coals.
3. Place the marinated pork tenderloins on the grill.
4. Smoke roast the pork evenly for about 40 minutes, until its internal temperature reaches 165°F.
5. If served immediately after cooking, allow it to rest on the edge of the grill for 10 minutes or so to let the juices redistribute in the meat.
Good served either hot or cold, accompanied by a green tomato chutney.
